title: The World Reacts Before the Reverie
description: On pages 7–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Morgans, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Luffy as News of Whole Cake Island spreads across the world and the story pivots toward the Reverie.
scene: The world learns a distorted version of the Whole Cake Island incident as royal delegations move toward the Reverie.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The world is preparing for the reverie...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Fishman Island - The Ryugu Kingdom...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: He finally did it-Jamon!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Jinbe finally joined Luffy- Kun's crew!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't believe they got together and started a fight with big mom...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wonder if they escaped on the same ship...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: they must have. Big mom is prob- ably seeing red right now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, then we have no other option but to declare this country under the straw hat crew's protection!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Father!! Big Brothers!!...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I...I will go with you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I don't go to the reverie, luffy-sama will call me WEAK-HOSHI again.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...hoh, hoh, hoh!! we've been waiting for you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Alright, let's go!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but more important than the start of this meeting...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is the news that has grabbed the attention of the whole world. Big mom, the emperor whose position has not wavered in decades...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...has had fangs bared at her by the young pirate, straw hat luffy.

dialogue.speaker: Morgans
dialogue.text: This event was reported in the newspaper...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ...and according to certain sources...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Straw hat Luffy has seven powerful pirate crews serving under his flag...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With one of them being a great captain that commands a fleet of 5000 subordinates.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With the legacy of his brother ace behind him, the fact that he is a sworn brother of the second-in-command of the revolutionary army has also become a hot topic across the world.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With his extraordinary charisma and leadership, he was able to convince...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The evil army of Germa, the sun pirates, and the fire tank pirates to follow his commands without delay.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With his intelligence, he carefully planned this operation, and in the process, he managed to destroy the queen's castle.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: His strength allowed him to defeat two com- manders, worth over 800 million and over 1 billion respectively.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Therefore, this incident is surely...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Straw hat Luffy's Victory!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Fifth Emperor of the Sea has emerged!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Report- ing in!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Fleet Admiral Sakazuki!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: While on their way to the Reverie... the Lullusia* kingdom's ship was attacked by pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Their King is safe, but... Princess Komane has been kid- napped....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What kind of an EscORT lets that _happen!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Grand- Father!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, have you read this yet? Luffy's in the news!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Luffyland is amazing- RESU!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: As expected of our boss- resu!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Once we get to the Holy Land, you cannot speak of this. Do you understand?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: They mentioned us, too! Ehehehehe!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Oh, that's right!! We're Pirates now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: UHFUFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFOFO

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: There's no mistaking it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Swish...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those are the ships of the Dressrossa and Prodence Kingdoms!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: They don't have any Marines guarding them!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That... that's Princess Viola!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's just as beautiful as they say. (1)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wonder what kind of a ransom we could get if we kidnapped her?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Right!? Princess Komane. (1)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: WAAH! Hurry up and contact papa already!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He'll give you as much money as you want!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: gyaha haha!! This is why I love royalty!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but you're going to have to wait a little longer. We're quite greedy, after all...

summary: This section advances the Reverie Setup storyline with 53 dialogue beats. The aftermath becomes world news and the narrative shifts toward the Reverie and global politics.
